audit_notes: Audited 3 leaves: (1) section '10-06 直列システムと並列システム' → '串联系统与并联系统' / 'Serial Systems and Parallel Systems' — correct technical term ('串联' for series, not '串行' which means serial-as-in-bitstream). (2) term '直列システム' definition — 'シンプレックスシステム' rendered as '单工系统' / 'simplex system', failure-stops-all logic preserved accurately. (3) figure caption matches surface. No choice markers.
